name: Sidir Alchibal

abilities.name: Fortune Favors the Bold
abilities.text: After this model discards a friendly upgrade, it may move up to 2".

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

triggers.name: Inspiration
triggers.text: This model gains a Focused token.

triggers.name: Bloody Fate
triggers.text: Draw a card. If the target was not killed, discard a card.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Clustered Rounds
triggers.text: When resolving, this action does not receive raises, and damage from this action ignores the target's (fortitude) abilities.

actions.name: Mortar Strike
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range, then remove either a piece of destructible terrain or a marker within 2" of the made marker.

triggers.name: Cleanup Duty
triggers.text: This model may declare a (gun) action targeting an enemy model within 2" of the made marker, which receives a (+).

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Maneuver
triggers.text: Another ally within LoS may move up to 3".

extraction_notes: The shield icon mentioned in Ruthless is rendered as (unusual_defense) as it represents the defensive ability type
